document.title: 승 인 원 [Approval Sheet] / 부품 승인원

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet for BLUE_1417_GF_KAPTONE_TAPE_ROIC part number MSV-100013 supplied by ㈜케이원코퍼레이션 to ㈜H&abyz.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as a supplier/customer part approval package covering drawings, raw material list, material properties, QC process flow, inspection criteria, and packaging specifications.
keyPoints: The approval package is addressed to ㈜H&abyz and identifies FROM(제작업체) as ㈜케이원코퍼레이션.
The applicable models are listed as G1417FW and G1417FWP.
The part name is BLUE_1417_GF_KAPTONE_TAPE_ROIC and the part number is MSV-100013.
The revision history states Rev. 0 with initial establishment on 2025.03.12.
The raw material list identifies POLYMIDE SAH-7X-25NC from INNOX and DOUBLE TAPE KW-5050 from K-WON.
The control plan covers mass production and includes receiving inspection, lamination, punching, cutting, inspection/packing, outgoing inspection, and shipment.

evidence.claim: The document is an approval sheet.
The product or part name is BLUE_1417_GF_KAPTONE_TAPE_ROIC.
The model or part number is MSV-100013.
The applicable models are G1417FW and G1417FWP.
The revision history records Rev. 0 as the initial establishment.
The raw material list includes POLYMIDE SAH-7X-25NC from INNOX.
The raw material list includes DOUBLE TAPE KW-5050 from K-WON.
The QC process document identifies mass production status.
The control plan document number is KWQP-B-700-02-01.
Outgoing inspection uses AQL 0.65 at one time per lot.
Packaging specifications require package labels on individual first and second packaging.

reviewFlags.reason: The source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the source text does not mention FDA or any regulatory authority.
No explicit jurisdiction or regulatory status is present in the source text.
Revision appears as both Rev. 00 on the cover and Rev. 0 in revision history/control plan.
The source appears to be spreadsheet-derived text with minor OCR or extraction artifacts such as 'Produst/Part' and '부작'.
